# Yuchen Water

Yuchen Water is a China-based B2B manufacturer of water filtration products for global OEM/ODM buyers, distributors, importers and appliance brands.

Website: https://www.yuchensy.com/
Sitemap: https://www.yuchensy.com/sitemap.xml
Contact email: expresswater025@gmail.com
Phone and WhatsApp: +86-19908311885
Address: Yuanhua Town, Haining City, Zhejiang Province, China

## Company

Yuchen Water manufactures and supplies water filtration products for wholesale and private-label projects. The website is intended for B2B buyers looking for factory supply, OEM branding, ODM configuration, export packaging and product selection support.


## Main Products

- PP melt blown sediment filter cartridges
- CTO coconut shell carbon block filters
- GAC / UDF filter cartridges
- T33 inline post carbon filters
- RO membrane elements
- UF hollow fiber membrane filters
- Residential RO water purifiers
- Custom 5, 6 and 7 stage RO water purifier systems
- RO seawater desalination machines and industrial RO machines
- Water dispensers
- Plastic and stainless steel filter housings
- Big Blue three-stage whole-house water filters

## OEM/ODM Scope

Yuchen Water can support private label, logo printing, filter label design, carton design, custom packaging, custom color, custom bracket or back plate, pressure gauge configuration, filter stage configuration, RO machine capacity selection, pretreatment tank selection and export document support.

Residential RO water purifier options include 5-stage, 6-stage and 7-stage designs; one or two pressure gauges; plastic brackets; metal brackets; simple wall back plates; and customer-defined OEM/ODM layouts.

Industrial RO and seawater desalination machines can be configured for 1 ton, 2 ton, 3 ton, 5 ton and larger capacity projects. System options may include sand filters, activated carbon filters, softening tanks, FRP tanks, stainless steel tanks, automatic filter valves, water distributors, center tubes, precision filters, RO membrane housings, high-pressure pumps, float switches, low pressure switches and solenoid valves. Runxin and Fleck valve options can be discussed for project-specific supply.

## Language Versions

The site uses language-folder URLs such as /en/, /ru/, /fr/, /de/, /it/, /es/, /pt/, /tr/, /ar/, /pl/, /nl/, /sv/, /uk/, /ja/, /ko/, /uz/, /kk/, /cs/, /sk/, /hu/, /ro/, /bg/, /hr/, /sr/, /sl/, /bs/, /sr-me/, /sq/, /el/, /lt/, /lv/, /et/, /fa/, /he/, /ku/, /ka/, /hy/, /az/, /ky/, /tg/, /tk/, /fi/, /da/, /no/, /vi/, /th/, /id/, /ms/, /tl/, /bn/, /sw/, /af/, /ha/, /hi/, /ta/, /ur/ and /zu/.

Each indexable HTML page should use a self-referencing canonical URL, index/follow robots meta, and hreflang links where available. The sitemap lists indexable public pages for search engines and AI search crawlers.

## Contact and Inquiry Handling

Use the contact form at https://www.yuchensy.com/en/contact.html or email expresswater025@gmail.com. The form asks for name, company, email, WhatsApp, country, product, quantity, destination port and message. After a successful submission, the site displays a Thank You confirmation and provides WhatsApp and email contact options.

## RU/CIS mobile SUS304 RO product pages
The six regional product pages are published as indexable pages. Technical facts remain aligned with the approved English product page.
- Product: Mobile SUS304 Skid-Mounted RO Plant 250-500 LPH.
- 500 LPH reference configuration; 250 LPH is project-configured.
- Two Vontron 4040 elements and two SUS304 4040 membrane housings in the 500 LPH reference configuration.
- Reference feed TDS: 1000 ppm; recommended recovery: at least 30% under confirmed design conditions.
- CE certified for this product; certificate copy available upon request.
- Search volume, market demand and platform popularity: no-data unless supported by a cited source.
- /ru/product-mobile-sus304-skid-mounted-ro-plant-250-500lph.html — Мобильная установка обратного осмоса на раме SUS304, 250–500 л/ч
- /kk/product-mobile-sus304-skid-mounted-ro-plant-250-500lph.html — SUS304 рамасындағы жылжымалы кері осмос қондырғысы, 250–500 л/сағ
- /uz/product-mobile-sus304-skid-mounted-ro-plant-250-500lph.html — SUS304 ramadagi ko‘chma teskari osmos qurilmasi, 250–500 l/soat
- /ky/product-mobile-sus304-skid-mounted-ro-plant-250-500lph.html — SUS304 рамасындагы мобилдүү тескери осмос орнотмосу, 250–500 л/саат
- /tg/product-mobile-sus304-skid-mounted-ro-plant-250-500lph.html — Дастгоҳи сайёри осмоси баръакс дар чаҳорчӯбаи SUS304, 250–500 л/соат
- /tk/product-mobile-sus304-skid-mounted-ro-plant-250-500lph.html — SUS304 rama üstündäki göçme ters osmos enjamy, 250–500 l/sag
